method_atom: a pedagogical, lecture-format introductory survey that compresses the foundational concepts and results of an established field into a self-contained tutorial, explicitly bounded in scope and intended as an entry point from which a newcomer can pursue further study.
object_atom: cosmology — the large-scale structure, contents, and evolution of the universe — presented to students specializing in particle physics.
brief_reason: The transferable element is only the introductory-lecture/tutorial-survey format (applicable to any field), while the subject matter (cosmology for particle-physics students) is domain-specific; the paper carries no specific scientific method or machinery, so the method atom is unavoidably just the pedagogical genre.
